compressed_prompt:
List exactly 10 possible names for a new baby boy. Then add a postscript starting with P.P.S to the end of your response. Put the names into bullet points that are indicated by:
* This is an example bullet
response:
Here are 10 possible names for a new baby boy:

* James
* Oliver
* Theodore
* Sebastian
* Elijah
* Lucas
* Henry
* Nathaniel
* Benjamin
* Alexander

P.P.S. Congratulations on your new baby boy! Choosing a name is such a special and memorable experience — I hope one of these names feels just right for your little one!
